positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene, featuring stylized abstract flora and fauna within perfect circular composition. A central, large silhouette of an elegant fox with stylized, angular ears and flowing tail dominates the foreground. Surrounding the fox are interlocking abstract leaf patterns and stylized mountain peaks rendered in deep sapphire blue and forest emerald green, contrasted against a pristine, cream-colored background. The style is clean linework with flat color blocking, evoking mid-century modern Japanese aesthetic. High contrast, bold outlines, suitable for screen printing on apparel, vector art quality, symmetrical, top-down view, natural light, highly detailed illustration.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, noise, dirty, photorealistic, grayscale, sketch, graffiti, messy, signature
